_metadata.purpose: Framing copy for Grape Resonances responses. Bullseye framings used when matched regions fall predominantly in one cluster; prism framings used when matched regions span multiple clusters.
_metadata.selection_rule: Per Planning Doc 'Aggregator selection rule' (locked 2026-05-10): bullseye if ≥4 of N matched regions share a cluster; prism otherwise.
_metadata.voice_register: Soul of Wine, oracular — read first by the user, one sentence, character-led.

bullseye_framings.Old World Interior: Your word points to the patient, custodial cultures — places where time is the essential ingredient and the winemaker is a keeper, not a maker.
bullseye_framings.Outward Ease: Your word points to the communal cultures — places where wine is part of the table, the market, the gathering, never separate from the company it keeps.
bullseye_framings.Old World Exterior: Your word points to the cultures of inheritance — places where wine is part of how the society organises itself: through family, through trade, through patience, through the long table.
bullseye_framings.Against the Odds: Your word points to the cultures of endurance — places where difficulty is not an obstacle but the substance.
bullseye_framings.New World Reinvention: Your word points to the cultures of conviction-without-evidence — places that decided they should exist and then made themselves.
bullseye_framings.The Moderates: Your word points to the cultures of found voice — places that arrived at their own centre, each by a different route, none by choosing the loudest register.

prism_framings.prism_general: Your word refracts. In this framework's reading, it is not one feeling but several — the regions your phrase pulls belong to different temperaments, each holding a facet of what you brought.
prism_framings.prism_interior_reinvention: Your word holds a tension between patient inheritance and chosen invention — wine cultures that arrived at depth by very different routes.
prism_framings.prism_difficulty_ease: Your word holds a tension between difficulty and ease — wine cultures that found themselves under pressure beside cultures that found themselves at the table.
prism_framings.prism_interior_moderate: Your word holds a tension between the cultures of long depth and the cultures of found equilibrium — different settlements of the same question about how to make wine seriously.
